title: Table Widget - Tasks become blank when group is collapsed
excerpt:

posts.author: Naomi_C (Naomi Carreir)
posts.cookedHtml:
One of my boards is behaving oddly on the Table Widget.

I can see only group names + blank lines where the task name should be. If I click on the > to collapse the group, the group name becomes invisible (just a blank line). I can make the group name re-apear by clicking the 3 dots next to the blank line & selecting “expand” (and get all the blank lines for the sub tasks again)

This board is a duplicate of the other boards (we duplicate each month). All the other boards behave normally in the widget. They are all sharable boards. Has anyone had this happen?
